specific_mechanism: PICARD-AGENT: contraction map T + Lipschitz estimator + iterate to ε + L^n bound
llm_application: Define an LLM iteration as a map T from response to refined response in a fixed metric; estimate the Lipschitz constant L empirically; iterate until the fixed-point criterion is met; provide a convergence bound when L<1.
novelty_claim: Existing iterative LLM agents classify dynamics empirically; this provides provable Picard convergence.
